description: Merge conflict resolved at tier auto-resolve. Branch: overstory/v1doc-builder/seeds-e54b. Agent: v1doc-builder. Conflicting files: V1_DONE.md.

name: pi-seeds extension imports CLI typed sections in-process
description: The @os-eco/pi-seeds extension lives in the same npm package as the seeds CLI (@os-eco/seeds-cli). Auto-prime injection imports buildFullSections() from src/commands/prime.ts directly rather than shelling out to 'sd prime --json'. This eliminates subprocess + PATH lookup + JSON parsing, and the TypeScript types catch section-shape drift at compile time. Status-widget counts read .seeds/issues.jsonl via readIssues() for the same reason. Out-of-tree consumers using the JSON contract still need a defensive parser per the plan's risk note, but in-tree we trust the type.

name: pi-tool-shim-subprocess
description: Custom pi tools in the seeds extension shell out via pi.exec('sd', [...args, '--json'], {cwd: ctx.cwd, signal}) rather than calling command run() functions in-process. The CLI's outputJson writes to stdout, which would pollute the pi process if invoked directly. Subprocess preserves the JSON shape as the contract, lets domain errors come back as { success: false, error } parsed from stdout (or stderr when seeds throws outside --json), and naturally honors abort signals. Tools resolve ctx.cwd per execute call (not at registration) so worktree resolution stays correct after a /reload.

name: pi-seeds-autocomplete-wrapper
description: extensions/pi/lib/autocomplete.ts: createSeedsAutocompleteFactory wraps the current AutocompleteProvider so #sd-<id> completions take over only when extractRefPrefix matches the cursor position — all other prefixes (file, @, slash) fall through to current.getSuggestions/applyCompletion. Cache reads ReadyItem[] via a tiny ReadyCache interface; index.ts populates it at session_start and refreshes on agent_end when .seeds/issues.jsonl mtime changes. Reference expansion lives on pi.on('input') with InputEventResult: { action: 'transform', text } — prepends a <seeds-context> block with sd show --json bodies, capped at pi.reference_expansion.max_refs unique ids.
